history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a black motorcycle helmet with a distinctive grill-like faceplate and glasses is seated on a black motorcycle. They are also wearing a black leather jacket over a dark t-shirt and light grey pants. The person is adjusting the straps of their helmet with both hands. The motorcycle has a skull decal on the fuel tank. The background features lush green foliage, some of which is illuminated by a bright light source positioned to the left, creating a dramatic contrast between light and shadow. To the right, a sign with the word "Coffee" is visible. The ground is paved with square tiles. The overall mood is nocturnal, with a hint of urban coolness and an emphasis on the rider's gear and the motorcycle. The lighting is dramatic and moody, with strong highlights and deep shadows. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, black, grey, and deep greens, with pops of light from the illumination. The style is realistic with a slightly cinematic feel.
